about_content: Sitio Verdant Hills Youth Organization (SVHYO) is a community-based youth organization dedicated to empowering young people through leadership development, community service, and personal growth opportunities.
mission: To empower the youth through leadership development, community service, and personal growth opportunities, fostering responsible and engaged community leaders.
vision: A progressive community where young people are empowered, engaged, and equipped to become responsible leaders who drive positive change.
contact_address: Sitio Verdant Hills, Brgy. Pasong Tamo, Quezon City
